title: flow_decision_execute input
description: Input for evaluating a DMN decision by key.

decisionKey.title: Decision key
decisionKey.description: Key of the decision to evaluate (latest deployed version is used).

singleResult.title: Single result
singleResult.description: Use the engine's single-result evaluation (one output row) instead of the full list of matching rows.

inputVariables.description: Decision input variables: shorthand map {name: value} or explicit list [{name,type,value}].

apiConfiguration.description: Optional Flowable ApiConfiguration selector (full or partial UUID).
